changelog: Hotfix for v4.22.0: .claude/core/_lib/guardrail-rules.js required `zod` even though zod was no longer listed in package.json `dependencies` (zod's removal in commit fed66d2 — `refactor: move publish tooling to tools/ at repo root` — was an unintentional side-effect; the consumer was never updated). v4.22.0 worked locally only because node_modules/zod was leftover from earlier installs; on a clean `npm install`, guardrail-rules.js would crash on require, breaking the path-guardrail and the gate. Fix: hand-rolled the four-tier schema validation (six keys, simple shapes) without runtime deps. D1 fail-safe behavior preserved exactly — top-level structural failure still returns emptyRules(); a single invalid regex in dangerousPatterns still drops the entire tier list (block-safe). Tests unchanged in behavior (1319 passing); test/code comments updated to reflect hand-rolled instead of Zod. node_modules/zod and package-lock.json zod entries removed.
